added.description: Add `manage_cicd update --diff` preview support and configurable CI Git URL rewrite orgs via `ci.git_orgs`
Add multi-package hierarchical context/instructions for `documentation` and `autodoc`, including package-aware autodoc output pathing and a generated `docs/README.md` index

changed.description: Deduplicate shared CI workflow setup/analysis/proto blocks via mustache partials to keep generated workflows consistent and maintainable

fixed.description: Ensure update `--diff` previews on local-customization skips
Move hierarchical autodoc index output to a non-destructive generated file
Expand regression coverage for `TestCommand` timeout/failure edge paths and add tests for new workflow generator and sub-package utility behaviors
Confirm issue #30 is already resolved on main (streaming NDJSON parse in TestResultsUtil)
